name: Blueberry Snow
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water in a mixing bowl; set aside 10 minutes to soften.
2. Add boiling water and stir until completely dissolved. If the gelatin does not dissolve completely, heat slightly. Set aside.
3. Combine blueberries, lemon juice, and sugar replacement in a mixing bowl or food processor and whip into a puree. Stir thoroughly into the gelatin mixture.
4. When the blueberry mixture is cool, thick, and syrupy, beat until frothy. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
5. Spoon into 6 serving dishes; refrigerate until set.
6. Before serving, top with fresh strawberries.
Serving suggestion: 1 serving = 1/3 fruit calories = 18
